enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ni Sa Gari Sa?

The song conveys a playful and romantic vibe, celebrating love and connection between two people.

What is the context of this song in the movie Darling 2?

This song is featured in a light-hearted romantic setting, enhancing the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Ni Sa Gari Sa?

The song is sung by Anwesha Dutta and Naresh Iyer.

Who composed the music for Ni Sa Gari Sa?

The music for this song was composed by Radhan.

When was Ni Sa Gari Sa released?

The song was released on April 1, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ni Sa Gari Sa, the playful lyrics and upbeat melody encapsulate the joy of young love. Featured in the movie Darling 2, this duet showcases the chemistry between the lead characters as they express their feelings in a light-hearted manner. The song evokes a sense of happiness and celebration, making it perfect for romantic occasions. With its catchy tune and lively performance by Anwesha Dutta and Naresh Iyer, it resonates with anyone who has experienced the thrill of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ni Sa Gari Sa from Darling 2 is a vibrant duet that captures the essence of youthful romance. With the enchanting voices of Anwesha Dutta and Naresh Iyer, this track is sure to uplift your spirits. Experience the magic of Radhan's composition that perfectly complements the playful lyrics and lively beats.
stanzaMeanings: ni sa gari sa gari sa ni sa gari sa ne pa ma ni sa gari sa ma pa ga re
Are you going to say something? My eyes, my eyes, they both come to you, both to you.
ni sa gari sa gari sa ni sa gari sa ne pa ma
In the direction of the eyes, the water flows with the embrace.
I want to live for two, for your sake.
What have you done to me? What have you done to me? What have you done to me? What have you done to me?
ni sa gari sa gari sa ni sa gari sa ne pa ma ni sa gari sa ma pa ga re
With flowers and with flowers, what can the bees say? I see dreams that connect with fingers.
Whether in dreams or in memories, you are my only refuge, words spoken by the eyes are enough to unite life.
The smiles that are revealed will give birth to paths to laugh.
ni sa gari sa gari sa ni sa gari sa ne pa ma ni sa gari sa ma pa ga re
When desires are born, they bring light like clouds, at certain moments when the embrace is close, I fly high.
Crossing your threshold, the world slows down, when your gaze is intense, my heart breaks.
Will my world follow your path?
